_note: Operational config for the Phase 2 watch-and-propose flow. Adjust freely — the weekly agent reads this each run.

agent_behavior.diversity_preference: Spread the 10 picks across mediums/genres. A week of 10 music-only proposals should be rejected by the agent itself — re-filter if that happens. Aim for a mix: music (jazz/experimental/rock/world), dance, theater-experimental, festivals, other.
agent_behavior.short_circuit_on_obvious_pass: Chapel/Wayward and The Royal Room are ~always worth surfacing. VCA, Seattle Symphony, The Showbox etc. need harder filtering.
agent_behavior.never_repeat: Skip anything present in seen.json (by id). Skip anything present in rejected.json. Skip anything already in Public Events GCal (avoid duplicates).
